---
title: "sharing-PCA"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
ds <- read.csv("data/sl_hz30_sharing_NEWsocietalcomp_ds.csv")
ds <- ds %>%
  select(ID, OWC, all_freq_30_IA, sevnonfd_freq_30_IA, fd_freq_30_IA, freqdr_30_IA, freqsevdr_30_IA, freqLAPD_30_IA, freqfl_30_IA, S2_Resolved_IA_TR, S3_Resolved_IA_TR)
```


```{r}
pca_vars <- c("all_freq_30_IA", "sevnonfd_freq_30_IA", "fd_freq_30_IA", "freqdr_30_IA", "freqsevdr_30_IA", "freqLAPD_30_IA", "freqfl_30_IA")

X_all <- ds %>%
  transmute(
    ID,
    all_freq_30_IA = factor(all_freq_30_IA, ordered = TRUE),
    sevnonfd_freq_30_IA = factor(sevnonfd_freq_30_IA, ordered = TRUE),
    fd_freq_30_IA = factor(fd_freq_30_IA, ordered = TRUE),
    freqdr_30_IA = factor(freqdr_30_IA, ordered = TRUE),
    freqsevdr_30_IA = factor(freqsevdr_30_IA, ordered = TRUE),
    freqLAPD_30_IA = factor(freqLAPD_30_IA, ordered = TRUE),
    freqfl_30_IA = factor(freqfl_30_IA, ordered = TRUE)
  )

# 1) Complete-case subset for PCA; preserve ID
X_cc <- X_all %>% drop_na(all_of(pca_vars))

# (optional) cleanups
X_cc <- X_cc %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.list), ~unlist(., use.names = FALSE))) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.factor), droplevels))

# 2) Set rownames to ID so any matrix result carries IDs
rownames_df <- X_cc$ID

X_cc <- as.data.frame(X_cc %>%
  select(all_of(pca_vars)))

# 3) Mixed correlations
hc <- polycor::hetcor(X_cc, use = "complete.obs", std.err = FALSE)
hc
R  <- hc$correlations

# 4) PCA on R; get PC1 weights via regression scoring
pc1 <- psych::principal(R, nfactors = 1, rotate = "none")

L   <- as.matrix(unclass(pc1$loadings))    # 3x1 loadings
W   <- solve(R) %*% L                      # 3x1 regression weights

# 5) Build standardized numeric matrix in SAME ROW ORDER; set rownames=ID
Z <- scale(cbind(
  all_freq_30_IA = as.integer(X_cc$all_freq_30_IA),
  sevnonfd_freq_30_IA = as.integer(X_cc$sevnonfd_freq_30_IA),
  fd_freq_30_IA = as.integer(X_cc$fd_freq_30_IA),
  freqdr_30_IA = as.integer(X_cc$freqdr_30_IA),
  freqsevdr_30_IA = as.integer(X_cc$freqsevdr_30_IA),
  freqLAPD_30_IA = as.integer(X_cc$freqLAPD_30_IA),
  freqfl_30_IA = as.integer(X_cc$freqfl_30_IA)
))
rownames(Z) <- rownames_df

# 6) Compute PC1 scores and z-standardize them; names(PC1_def) are IDs
PC1_freq <- as.numeric(scale(Z %*% W))
names(PC1_freq) <- rownames_df

# 7) Turn into a data frame keyed by ID
scores_df <- tibble(
  ID = as.character(names(PC1_freq)),
  PC1_def = as.numeric(PC1_freq)
)

# 8) Join back to the full dataset by ID (rows with missing inputs get NA)
data_with_pc1 <- data %>%
  mutate(ID = as.character(ID)) %>%
  left_join(scores_df, by = "ID")


# data_clean <- data_with_pc1[complete.cases(data_with_pc1[, c("PC1_def", "Sev_T", "Pred_T")]), ]

```
